title: helichrysum decorum
intro: Helichrysum decorum, also known as the False Knapweed, is a perennial plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing antioxidant protection. Helichrysum decorum can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress.
